summary.en: This white paper analyzes the impact of AI agents on the SaaS business, outlines the strategies SaaS companies should adopt, and shares the real story of QueryPie AI's transformation from a SaaS vendor to an AI-native company.
summary.ko: This white paper analyzes the impact of AI agents on the SaaS business, outlines the strategies SaaS companies should adopt, and shares the real story of QueryPie AI's transformation from a SaaS vendor to an AI-native company.
summary.ja: 本ホワイトペーパーは、AIエージェントがSaaSビジネスに与える影響を分析し、SaaS企業が取るべき戦略と、QueryPie AI自身のSaaSベンダーからAI Native企業への変革の実録をお伝えします。

title.en: The End of SaaS, or Its Evolution? — Strategies SaaS Companies Must Adopt in the Age of AI Agents
title.ko: The End of SaaS, or Its Evolution? — Strategies SaaS Companies Must Adopt in the Age of AI Agents
title.ja: SaaSの終焉か、進化か 〜AIエージェント時代にSaaS企業が取るべき戦略〜
